creator: thomas.e.zander@googlemail.com
text:
On Fri, Nov 30, 2012 at 9:48 PM, Bryan Drewery <bdrewery@freebsd.org> wrote:
> I've tested this port with pkgng and pkg_install and am not seeing any
> problems. Could you elaborate on what the reported issue was and
> possibly provide a build log?

No, I can't.
A user has sent this to me during the early steps of pkgng. I have not
yet used pkgng myself.
If it works now, I assume during the evolution of pkgng over the last
couple of months, the problem faded away. Maybe this defect should be
closed ?!

Best
Riggs
